title: Ultimate Claude Code Guide: How to Use Claude Code for Beginners in 2026
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrating how to use Claude Code to build applications without traditional programming. The guide covers four example projects (landing page, Chrome extension, caption generator, habit tracker) and covers practical topics including multi-model workflows with Opus and Sonnet, debugging with screenshots, and common beginner pitfalls.
